products.name: Groovo Suite
products.description: Voice + chat + CRM-writeback for revenue teams. Connects to HubSpot, Salesforce, and Pipedrive.
products.pitch: Cut inbound response time from hours to under sixty seconds, with every call summarised in your CRM before the rep opens the lead.

products.name: Xylo Voice
products.description: Outbound SDR voice agent with calendar + CRM writeback. Built on Retell + Claude.
products.pitch: An SDR that never sleeps, never forgets the talk track, and books meetings while your reps are heads-down.

products.name: RevPilot
products.description: Pipeline scoring + deal coaching for AEs. Surfaces stalled deals, predicts close dates.
products.pitch: Stop guessing which deals are real. RevPilot reads every email and call so you can forecast in minutes, not days.

objections.objection: We already use a competing tool.
objections.response: Totally fair. Most teams who switch tell us Xylo writes back into CRM in ninety seconds rather than the next morning — would a fifteen-minute side-by-side help you see the difference?

objections.objection: We don't have budget right now.
objections.response: Understood. Could I send a one-pager and circle back at the start of next quarter when budgets reset?
No problem — who on your team owns inbound SDR tooling? I'd love to send them a short note with your context.
I hear that a lot. Reps tell us prospects can't tell within the first thirty seconds — would you mind if I sent a thirty-second recording so you can hear for yourself?
We're SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA-eligible, and your data never leaves your region. Happy to send the trust packet.

caseStudies.outcome: Booked 31% more discovery calls in the first 6 weeks
Replaced two contracted SDRs and saved $186k / year
Cut inbound first-touch from 4h to 38s while staying HIPAA-eligible

faqs.question: Which CRMs do you support?
faqs.answer: HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, and Close are supported today. Custom connectors are available on the Scale plan.

faqs.question: Can the agent call internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes — Xylo supports outbound calls to 48 countries. Per-minute rates vary by destination.

faqs.question: How long does setup take?
faqs.answer: Most teams are live within two business days. Onboarding includes a guided KB build and a calibration call.

faqs.question: Is the conversation recorded?
faqs.answer: Calls are recorded only where local law permits, and we honour two-party consent automatically. Recordings live in your tenant for 30 days.

data.competitorNotes: Air.ai prioritises volume; we win on CRM-writeback quality and Claude-grade reasoning. Bland is cheaper per minute; we beat them on meeting-booked conversion and timezone safety. Salesloft Cadence has no voice; we complement, not replace.
data.pricingNotes: Quote list price. Discounting requires AE approval above 10%. Annual prepay unlocks 12% off. No discount on Trial. Never mention internal margin or unit cost.
qualifyingQuestions: Are you the person who owns inbound SDR tooling at your company?
Roughly how many inbound leads does your team handle per week?
What does your team use to follow up on inbound leads today?
What's the average response time on a new inbound lead right now?
If we could cut that response time to under a minute, would you want to see a live demo?
doNotMention: specific named competitors unless the prospect names them first
the names of other customers beyond the published case studies
